parityMeta.describes: SR-2 replacement-engine knowledge snapshot — dumps the engine-used EXERCISE_EQUIVALENCE_CHAINS (id + members, keyed by exercise id) and the engine-used subset of every EXERCISE_KNOWLEDGE_OVERRIDES value (fatigueCost / equivalenceChainId / alternativeIds / alternativePriorities / regressionIds / progressionIds). The Swift ReplacementEngineKnowledge tables reconcile every entry item-by-item.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: No engine input — generateReplacementEngineKnowledge transcribes the frozen src/data/exerciseLibrary.ts tables. Generated; never hand-edited (parity contract §22).
